title: Visual Mode Page Rendering
description: Activity flow for generating the /visual-mode static HTML sub-page inside generateSubPages()
activity_flow: START: generateSubPages(rootDir) called (from build.js or server/index.js)
ACTION: await buildSubPageData(rootDir) → data {skillsByCategory, tutorials, rules, knownSkillIds}
ACTION: If visualMode dir exists → fs.rmSync(dir, recursive) [purge stale files]
ACTION: Call renderVisualModeMain() [no arguments — reads module-level GALLERY_ITEMS]
BRANCH: For each item in GALLERY_ITEMS → build specimenCard HTML (<a> with thumb img + title/desc)
ACTION: Assemble full page body: header section + live iframe demo section + three-method section + gallery grid
RETURN: bodyHtml string (single-column layout, no sidebar)
ACTION: Call renderPage({ title, description, bodyHtml, activeNav:'visual-mode', canonicalPath:'/visual-mode', bodyClass:'sub-page visual-mode-page-body' })
ACTION: renderPage injects full HTML shell (<!DOCTYPE>, <head> with meta/canonical/assets, <body> with nav + bodyHtml + scripts)
(other page blocks execute for skills, anti-patterns, tutorials)

key_functions.name: renderVisualModeMain()
sections_produced: .visual-mode-methods — three-card grid (inside /critique, npx impeccable live, Chrome extension)

key_functions.name: renderPage(opts)
key_functions.signature: export function renderPage({ title, description, bodyHtml, activeNav, canonicalPath, bodyClass, extraHead?, assetDepth? }): string
key_functions.role: Wraps bodyHtml in full HTML document shell; resolves asset paths relative to page depth (default depth=1)

key_functions.name: escapeHtml(str)
key_functions.role: Sanitizes user-data strings before injecting into HTML attributes/text

key_functions.name: escapeAttr(str)
key_functions.role: Escapes only double-quotes for HTML attribute values

data_sources.name: GALLERY_ITEMS
data_sources.shape: Array<{ id: string, title: string, desc: string }>
data_sources.use: Generates specimen gallery cards; each card links to /antipattern-examples/{id}.html with thumbnail ../antipattern-images/{id}.png

output_artifact.how_created: fs.writeFileSync after renderPage() wraps renderVisualModeMain() output
output_artifact.layout: Single-column, no sidebar (unlike skills/tutorials pages which use wrapInDocsLayout)

conditions_and_branches: No guard condition on visual-mode block — always executes unconditionally inside generateSubPages
GALLERY_ITEMS iteration: one card rendered per item (map, no filter)
Output directory always wiped and recreated (no incremental: stale files purged first)
dependencies: buildSubPageData (scripts/lib/sub-pages-data.js) — fetches site data (not used inside renderVisualModeMain itself)
renderPage (scripts/lib/render-page.js) — wraps content in site shell
important_notes: renderVisualModeMain takes no parameters and doesn't use the shared `data` object; it is fully self-contained, reading only the module-scope GALLERY_ITEMS. The iframe embed points to /antipattern-examples/visual-mode-demo.html (a separate pre-built file). activeNav='visual-mode' marks the nav item in the site shell.
